title: Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple
tagline: Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple (கானாட்டம்புலியூர் பதஞ்சலிநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Kanattampuliyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple (கானாட்டம்புலியூர் பதஞ்சலிநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Kanattampuliyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirukanattumullur. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Patanjaleeswarar.

topPlaces.name: Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple (ஓமாம்புலியூர் துயர்தீர்த்தநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Omapuliyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Umapuliyur.

topPlaces.name: Ayangudi, Cuddalore
topPlaces.description: Ayangudi is an Indian village located in Kattumannarkoil taluk in the Cuddalore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 73 kilometres (45 mi) to the south of the district headquarters Cuddalore, 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Kattumannarkoil and 225 km from State capital Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Kattumannarkoil
topPlaces.description: Kattumannarkoil is a Municipality and taluk headquarters in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kattumannarkoil Town Panchayat constituted in 1892.

topPlaces.name: Kattumannarkoil block
topPlaces.description: Kattumannarkoil block is a revenue block of Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consist of 55 panchayat villages.Total area of Kattumannarkoil is 455 km2 including 406.38 km2 rural area and 48.74 km2 urban area.Kattumannarkoil has a population of 2,76,947 peoples.

topPlaces.name: Mela Kadambur Amirthakadeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Mela Kadambur Amirthakadeswarar Temple (மேலக்கடம்பூர் அமிர்தகடேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) (Sanskrit: Amruta: nectar Ghata: pot Iswara: God) is a Hindu temple located at Melakadambur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirukadambur.

topPlaces.name: Kundala Karaneswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Kundaleswarar or Kundalakaneswarar temple (Tamil: திருக்குரகாவல்)(குண்டலகரணேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thirukkurankaval near Vaitheeswaran Koil in Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India The presiding deity is KundalaKaraneswarar, a form of the Hindu god Shiva and his consort Bala Tripura Sundari. This place is also referred to as ThiruKurakkukka or Thiru KoranguKukka .

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Korukkai
topPlaces.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Korukkai Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Korukkai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Gnanambigai.

topPlaces.name: Lalpet
topPlaces.description: Lalpet is a Panchayat town in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu. Lalpet is situated in lush green surrounding with water bodies.

items.note: Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple (ஓமாம்புலியூர் துயர்தீர்த்தநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Omapuliyur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Umapuliyur.

Ayangudi is an Indian village located in Kattumannarkoil taluk in the Cuddalore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 73 kilometres (45 mi) to the south of the district headquarters Cuddalore, 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Kattumannarkoil and 225 km from State capital Chennai.
Kattumannarkoil is a Municipality and taluk headquarters in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kattumannarkoil Town Panchayat constituted in 1892.

Kattumannarkoil block is a revenue block of Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consist of 55 panchayat villages.Total area of Kattumannarkoil is 455 km2 including 406.38 km2 rural area and 48.74 km2 urban area.Kattumannarkoil has a population of 2,76,947 peoples.

Mela Kadambur Amirthakadeswarar Temple (மேலக்கடம்பூர் அமிர்தகடேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) (Sanskrit: Amruta: nectar Ghata: pot Iswara: God) is a Hindu temple located at Melakadambur in Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirukadambur.

The Kundaleswarar or Kundalakaneswarar temple (Tamil: திருக்குரகாவல்)(குண்டலகரணேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thirukkurankaval near Vaitheeswaran Koil in Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India The presiding deity is KundalaKaraneswarar, a form of the Hindu god Shiva and his consort Bala Tripura Sundari. This place is also referred to as ThiruKurakkukka or Thiru KoranguKukka .

Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Korukkai Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Korukkai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Gnanambigai.
Lalpet is a Panchayat town in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu. Lalpet is situated in lush green surrounding with water bodies.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (108 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanattampuliyur Pathanchalinathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Omampuliyur Thuyartheertanathar Temple, Ayangudi, Cuddalore, Kattumannarkoil, Kattumannarkoil block, Mela Kadambur Amirthakadeswarar Temple.
